info_CN: 减论Agent通过算法为您推荐
马萨诸塞大学阿默斯特分校、约翰霍普金斯大学与卡内基梅隆大学联合介绍了Virtual Community方法
该方法基于通用物理引擎和真实三维场景构建开放世界平台
支持多智能体物理仿真
旨在研究人类与机器人在共享社区中的智能协作、社会关系发展及共存机制
and Carnegie Mellon University presented Virtual Community
an open-world platform built on a universal physics engine and grounded in real-world 3D scenes to study embodied social intelligence among humans
and society through multi-agent interactions and community generation
info_EN: and Carnegie Mellon University presented Virtual Community
an open-world platform built on a universal physics engine and grounded in real-world 3D scenes to study embodied social intelligence among humans
and society through multi-agent interactions and community generation
